cities.name: London
cities.notes: Big Ben, British Museum, Tower of London, West End theatre and markets

cities.name: Oxford
cities.notes: Dreaming spires, Bodleian Library, punting on the Cherwell and Ashmolean

cities.name: Cambridge
cities.notes: King's College Chapel, punting on the Cam and Mathematical Bridge

cities.name: Bath
cities.notes: Roman Baths, Georgian Royal Crescent and Thermae Bath Spa

cities.name: York
cities.notes: Viking Jorvik museum, York Minster and 13th-century city walls walk

cities.name: Stonehenge
cities.notes: Prehistoric megalith monument on Salisbury Plain, 5000 years old

cities.name: Edinburgh
cities.notes: Edinburgh Castle, Royal Mile, Arthur's Seat hike and Fringe Festival

cities.name: Glasgow
cities.notes: Mackintosh architecture, Kelvingrove museum, vibrant music scene

cities.name: Inverness
cities.notes: Gateway to Loch Ness, Culloden Battlefield and Highland drives

cities.name: Isle of Skye
cities.notes: Old Man of Storr, Fairy Pools and Dunvegan Castle landscapes

cities.name: St Andrews
cities.notes: Home of golf, medieval cathedral ruins and seaside cliff walks
